concerns.text: Task T022 mandates implementing a 'One-sample t-test' to compare mean SAA to the baseline. This directly violates FR-007's requirement for a t-test, which the Plan (Complexity Tracking) explicitly rejects as 'statistically invalid' for comparing a sample against a point estimate, substituting 'Bootstrap CI' instead. The task implements a method the plan deems invalid, creating a semantic contradiction with the verification strategy required by SC-002.

Task T005 instructs to 'fetch CiteVQA dataset from verified URL (e.g., HuggingFace...)' without a confirmed source. The Plan explicitly states the project is 'blocked' until a verified source URL is provided and no synthetic data is allowed. This task presumes the existence of a verified URL that the Plan says is missing, violating the 'Critical Dependency' constraint and Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy).

Task T013 specifies loading 'Phi-3-mini' but omits the 'quantized to 4-bit' constraint mandated in spec.md Assumptions to fit the 7GB RAM limit. Without explicit quantization, the task risks violating the hard memory constraint (SC-004) and the CPU-only execution constraint, as the full precision model may exceed available resources.

Task T027 requires loading a 'small vision-capable model' for the Visual-Only control. The Spec (US-3) and Plan require strict modality decoupling (Constitution Principle VII) and CPU-only execution. The task lacks the explicit constraint to use a CPU-tractable, quantized model, risking a violation of the 7GB RAM limit and the 'No GPU/CUDA' constraint found in the Plan.
